ddls:
CREATE TABLE "baby_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the baby */,
  "fraction" REAL /* Fraction of total births that the name represents */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the baby (m for male, f for female) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Popularity rank of the name for that year */,
  "cultural_significance" TEXT /* Cultural significance of the name */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the name */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the name */,
  "variant_names" TEXT /* Variant names for the baby name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baby_names_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "decade" INTEGER /* Decade of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender code (m for male, f for female) */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_popularity_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baby name */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Calculated trend value for the name over the years */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trend (increasing or decreasing) */,
  "rate_of_change" REAL /* Rate of change of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_popularity_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_popularity_trends_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., metropolitan, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_region_popularity" (
  "name_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name-region entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baby name */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score for the name in that region */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the name within the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_region_popularity_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_region_popularity_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baby name accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_cultural_significance" (
  "cultural_significance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultural significance entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baby name */,
  "significance" TEXT /* Cultural significance of the name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cultural significance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cultural_significance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_cultural_significance_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant entry */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baby name */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Variant name of the baby name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_variants_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_collection_names" (
  "collection_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection-name entry */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the baby name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_collection_names_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_collection_names_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES name_collections ("collection_id")
)
